R=function(R,s,G,D,l,q)return C(n,{R,s;G,D;l;q},J,Q)end return R end,601664+-601664 return(M(13720432-1006441,{}))(Q(l))end)(newproxy,select,getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
